title: Fly Movement
description: This move control causes the mob to fly.

max_turn.title: Max Turn
max_turn.description: The maximum number in degrees the mob can turn per tick.

start_speed.title: Start Speed
start_speed.description: Initial speed of the mob when it starts gliding.

speed_when_turning.title: Speed when turning
speed_when_turning.description: Speed that the mob adjusts to when it has to turn quickly.
